'''鈭歬-r-ng-t''' ('''kakarngetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:champion|champion]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-r-ng-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:champion|champion]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-r-ng-t
|-
! Lemma
| kakarngetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikarngetoko|thikarngetoko]] || [[word:jikarngetoko|jikarngetoko]] || [[word:shikarngetoko|shikarngetoko]] || [[word:kikarngetoko|kikarngetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukarngetoko|thuthukarngetoko]] || [[word:jujukarngetoko|jujukarngetoko]] || [[word:shushukarngetoko|shushukarngetoko]] || [[word:kukukarngetoko|kukukarngetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukarngetoko|thukarngetoko]] || [[word:jukarngetoko|jukarngetoko]] || [[word:shukarngetoko|shukarngetoko]] || [[word:kukarngetoko|kukarngetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukarngetoko|thukarngetoko]] || [[word:jukarngetoko|jukarngetoko]] || [[word:shukarngetoko|shukarngetoko]] || [[word:kukarngetoko|kukarngetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekarngetoko|thekarngetoko]] || [[word:jekarngetoko|jekarngetoko]] || [[word:shekarngetoko|shekarngetoko]] || [[word:kekarngetoko|kekarngetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokarngetoko|thothokarngetoko]] || [[word:jojokarngetoko|jojokarngetoko]] || [[word:shoshokarngetoko|shoshokarngetoko]] || [[word:kokokarngetoko|kokokarngetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokarngetoko|thokarngetoko]] || [[word:jokarngetoko|jokarngetoko]] || [[word:shokarngetoko|shokarngetoko]] || [[word:kokarngetoko|kokarngetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokarngetoko|thokarngetoko]] || [[word:jokarngetoko|jokarngetoko]] || [[word:shokarngetoko|shokarngetoko]] || [[word:kokarngetoko|kokarngetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙karngetoko|th忙karngetoko]] || [[word:j忙karngetoko|j忙karngetoko]] || [[word:sh忙karngetoko|sh忙karngetoko]] || [[word:k忙karngetoko|k忙karngetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakarngetoko|thathakarngetoko]] || [[word:jajakarngetoko|jajakarngetoko]] || [[word:shashakarngetoko|shashakarngetoko]] || [[word:kakakarngetoko|kakakarngetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakarngetoko|thakarngetoko]] || [[word:jakarngetoko|jakarngetoko]] || [[word:shakarngetoko|shakarngetoko]] || [[word:kakarngetoko|kakarngetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakarngetoko|thakarngetoko]] || [[word:jakarngetoko|jakarngetoko]] || [[word:shakarngetoko|shakarngetoko]] || [[word:kakarngetoko|kakarngetoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
